cards.title: Simple Product Explanation
cards.safe_prompt: Explain AndyAI Finance Engine to a non-technical business owner.
cards.boundary: No execution. No financial advice. No database write.

cards.title: Proof Explanation
cards.safe_prompt: Explain read-only proof and why mutation is blocked.
cards.boundary: No provider call. Static explanation only.

cards.title: Client Pilot Conversation
cards.safe_prompt: Explain what a safe pilot could look like.
cards.boundary: No sales claim beyond current proof.
